afterpay_general.label: General Settings
afterpay_general.comment: Do you want to offer this or other Riverty payment methods to your customers? Contact Riverty

active.label: Module enabled
active.comment: Select Yes to enable the module.
active.tooltip: To use the module it needs to be enabled. When No is selected the module isn’t shown on the front of the shop.

show_advanced.label: Show advanced settings
show_advanced.comment: Select Yes to show advanced settings

success_redirect.label: Success URL
success_redirect.comment: The page a customer is redirected to when an order is accepted. Leave blank for default magento.

failure_redirect.label: Failure URL
failure_redirect.comment: The page a customer is redirected to when an order is denied. Leave blank for default magento.

validation_redirect.label: Validation URL
validation_redirect.comment: The page a customer is redirected to when an order is denied by validation error. Leave blank for default magento.

auto_invoice.label: Auto-Invoice
auto_invoice.comment: Select Yes to automatically invoice orders in Magento when they are accepted by Riverty

auto_invoice_status.label: Auto invoice status
auto_invoice_status.comment: Select status on which the invoice must be created

send_invoice.label: Send Invoice Mail
send_invoice.comment: Select Yes to send Magento Invoice mail

separate_discount.label: Separate Discount
separate_discount.comment: Select Yes to sent the discount as separate order line to Riverty

debug_mode.label: Debug
debug_mode.comment: Select if you want extra information to debug.

debug_mail.label: Debug E-mail
debug_mail.comment: For multiple emails separate them using a comma.

high.label: High VAT tax classes
high.comment: Select which tax classes count as 'high' VAT

low.label: Low VAT tax classes
low.comment: Select which tax classes count as 'low' VAT

zero.label: Zero VAT tax classes
zero.comment: Select which tax classes count as 'zero' VAT

no.label: No VAT tax classes
no.comment: Select which tax classes count as 'no' VAT

discount_tax_class.label: Tax class for Discount
discount_tax_class.comment: Select which tax class should be used for the Discount
discount_tax_class.tooltip: Default none is selected as the discount tax class.

active.label: Portfolio enabled
active.comment: Select Yes to enable the portfolio.
active.tooltip: To use the module it needs to be enabled. When No is selected the module isn’t shown on the front of the shop.

limit_by_ip.label: Show payment method only for certain IP adresses

limit_by_ip_ips.label: IP Adresses
limit_by_ip_ips.comment: Use comma to seperate IP adresses

reversed_iprestriction.label: Hide payment method only for certain IP adresses

reversed_iprestriction_ips.label: IP Adresses
reversed_iprestriction_ips.comment: Use comma to seperate IP adresses

mode.label: Mode
mode.comment: Select Live to preform live transactions.
mode.tooltip: When the base configuration is still in test mode. Live mode of the portfolio is overruled.

live_merchant_id.label: Live merchantID
live_merchant_id.comment: Your user account is provided by Riverty.
live_merchant_id.tooltip: To get an account contact Riverty.

test_merchant_id.label: Test merchantID
test_merchant_id.comment: Your user account is provided by Riverty.

portfolio_id.label: Portfolio ID
portfolio_id.comment: Riverty will deliver a portfolio ID

live_password.label: Live Password
live_password.comment: Your Password is provided by Riverty.

test_password.label: Test Password
test_password.comment: Your Password is provided by Riverty.

portfolio_country.label: Portfolio country
portfolio_country.comment: Select the country of transaction contract

portfolio_type.label: Portfolio type
portfolio_type.comment: Select the type of transaction contract

portfolio_showbankaccount.label: Show bankaccount input field
portfolio_showbankaccount.comment: Select Yes to show the bankaccount input field.
portfolio_showbankaccount.tooltip: When No is selected the bankaccount number is not shown on the front of the shop.

portfolio_showphonenumber.label: Show phone number input field
portfolio_showphonenumber.comment: Select Yes to show the phone number input field.
portfolio_showphonenumber.tooltip: When No is selected the phone number is not shown on the front of the shop.

portfolio_showssn.label: Show social security number input field
portfolio_showssn.comment: Select Yes to show the social security number input field.
portfolio_showssn.tooltip: When No is selected the social security number is not shown on the front of the shop.

portfolio_showdob.label: Show date of birth input field
portfolio_showdob.comment: Select Yes to show the date of birth input field.
portfolio_showdob.tooltip: When No is selected the date of birth is not shown on the front of the shop.

area.label: Portfolio area
area.comment: Select where the portfolio will be available

portfolio_label.label: Portfolio label
portfolio_label.comment: The label shown on the frontend

portfolio_extended_information.label: Portfolio extended information
portfolio_extended_information.comment: Extended information about the Riverty Payment Method which for example will be included in transactional emails.

portfolio_max_amount_new_customers.label: Maximum Amount for New Riverty Customers
portfolio_max_amount_new_customers.comment: N.B. This value does not influence whether or not this portfolio is available. This is only used as a label!

order_status_acceptedni.label: Status Accepted No Invoice
order_status_acceptedni.comment: New is the default state for a new order without invoice.
order_status_acceptedni.tooltip: For administrative purposes a new status can be created connected to processing.

order_status_pending.label: Status Pending
order_status_pending.comment: Pending is the default state for a new order.
order_status_pending.tooltip: For administrative purposes a new status can be created connected to new.

order_status_accepted.label: Status Accepted
order_status_accepted.comment: Processing is the default state for an order with an invoice or a shipment.
order_status_accepted.tooltip: For administrative purposes a new status can be created connected to processing.

order_status_refused.label: Status Refused
order_status_refused.comment: Canceled is the default state for an unprocessed order terminated.
order_status_refused.tooltip: For administrative purposes a new status can be created connected to Canceled.

allowspecific.label: Allowed Countries
allowspecific.tooltip: Select whether all countries may make use of this payment option, or only specific countries.

specificcountry.label: Payment from Specific Country
specificcountry.comment: Only available if 'Payment from applicable countries' is set to 'specific countries'.
specificcountry.tooltip: Define which countries are allowed to make use of this portfolio.

allowspecific_customers.label: Allowed Client groups
allowspecific_customers.tooltip: Select whether all customers may make use of this payment option, or only customers from specific customer groups.

specificcustomers.label: Specific client groups
specificcustomers.comment: Only available if 'Allowed Client groups' is set to 'specific client groups'.
specificcustomers.tooltip: Define which client groups are allowed to make use of this portfolio.

notallowedshippingmethods.label: Not allowed by shipping methods
notallowedshippingmethods.comment: Select all the shipping methods where the Riverty module should NOT be allowed for.
notallowedshippingmethods.tooltip: Use CTRL + mouseclick to select multiple entries.

sort_order.label: Sort order
sort_order.tooltip: This value will determine in what order the portfolio's will appear to the customer

active.label: Portfolio enabled
active.comment: Select Yes to enable the portfolio.
active.tooltip: To use the module it needs to be enabled. When No is selected the module isn’t shown on the front of the shop.

area.label: Portfolio area

portfolio_label.label: Portfolio label

portfolio_extended_information.label: Portfolio extended information
portfolio_extended_information.comment: Extended information about the Riverty Payment Method which for example will be included in transactional emails.

portfolio_max_amount_new_customers.label: Maximum Amount for New Riverty Customers
portfolio_max_amount_new_customers.comment: N.B. This value does not influence whether or not this portfolio is available. This is only used as a label!

order_status_acceptedni.label: Status Accepted No Invoice
order_status_acceptedni.comment: New is the default state for a new order without invoice.
order_status_acceptedni.tooltip: For administrative purposes a new status can be created connected to processing.

order_status_pending.label: Status Pending
order_status_pending.comment: Pending is the default state for a new order.
order_status_pending.tooltip: For administrative purposes a new status can be created connected to new.

order_status_accepted.label: Status Accepted
order_status_accepted.comment: Processing is the default state for an order with an invoice or a shipment.
order_status_accepted.tooltip: For administrative purposes a new status can be created connected to processing.

order_status_refused.label: Status Refused
order_status_refused.comment: Canceled is the default state for an unprocessed order terminated.
order_status_refused.tooltip: For administrative purposes a new status can be created connected to Canceled.

allowspecific.label: Allowed Countries
allowspecific.tooltip: Select whether all countries may make use of this payment option, or only specific countries.

specificcountry.label: Payment from Specific Country

specificcountry.tooltip: Define which countries are allowed to make use of this portfolio.

allowspecific_customers.tooltip: Select whether all customers may make use of this payment option, or only customers from specific customer groups.

notallowedshippingmethods.comment: Select all the shipping methods where the Riverty module should NOT be allowed for.

usegroupid.label: Use GroupId
usegroupid.tooltip: Select if the GroupId should be in the request, and on which attribute it should be based.

sort_order.label: Sort order
sort_order.tooltip: This value will determine in what order the portfolio's will appear to the customer

active.label: Portfolio enabled

active.tooltip: To use the module it needs to be enabled. When No is selected the module isn’t shown on the front of the shop.

portfolio_label.label: Portfolio label
portfolio_label.comment: The label shown on the frontend

portfolio_extended_information.label: Portfolio extended information
portfolio_extended_information.comment: Extended information about the Riverty Payment Method which for example will be included in transactional emails.

portfolio_max_amount_new_customers.label: Maximum Amount for New Riverty Customers
portfolio_max_amount_new_customers.comment: N.B. This value does not influence whether or not this portfolio is available. This is only used as a label!

order_status_acceptedni.label: Status Accepted No Invoice
order_status_acceptedni.comment: New is the default state for a new order without invoice.
order_status_acceptedni.tooltip: For administrative purposes a new status can be created connected to processing.

order_status_pending.label: Status Pending
order_status_pending.comment: Pending is the default state for a new order.
order_status_pending.tooltip: For administrative purposes a new status can be created connected to new.

order_status_accepted.label: Status Accepted
order_status_accepted.comment: Processing is the default state for an order with an invoice or a shipment.
order_status_accepted.tooltip: For administrative purposes a new status can be created connected to processing.

order_status_refused.label: Status Refused
order_status_refused.comment: Canceled is the default state for an unprocessed order terminated.
order_status_refused.tooltip: For administrative purposes a new status can be created connected to Canceled.

allowspecific.label: Allowed Countries
allowspecific.tooltip: Select whether all countries may make use of this payment option, or only specific countries.

specificcountry.label: Payment from Specific Country
specificcountry.comment: Only available if 'Payment from applicable countries' is set to 'specific countries'.
specificcountry.tooltip: Define which countries are allowed to make use of this portfolio.

allowspecific_customers.label: Allowed Client groups
allowspecific_customers.tooltip: Select whether all customers may make use of this payment option, or only customers from specific customer groups.

specificcustomers.label: Specific client groups
specificcustomers.comment: Only available if 'Allowed Client groups' is set to 'specific client groups'.
specificcustomers.tooltip: Define which client groups are allowed to make use of this portfolio.

notallowedshippingmethods.label: Not allowed by shipping methods
notallowedshippingmethods.comment: Select all the shipping methods where the Riverty module should NOT be allowed for.
notallowedshippingmethods.tooltip: Use CTRL + mouseclick to select multiple entries.

usegroupid.label: Use GroupId
usegroupid.tooltip: Select if the GroupId should be in the request, and on which attribute it should be based.

sort_order.label: Sort order
sort_order.tooltip: This value will determine in what order the portfolio's will appear to the customer

active.label: Portfolio enabled
active.comment: Select Yes to enable the portfolio.
active.tooltip: To use the module it needs to be enabled. When No is selected the module isn’t shown on the front of the shop.

limit_by_ip.label: Show payment method only for certain IP adresses

limit_by_ip_ips.label: IP Adresses
limit_by_ip_ips.comment: Use comma to seperate IP adresses

reversed_iprestriction.label: Hide payment method only for certain IP adresses

reversed_iprestriction_ips.label: IP Adresses
reversed_iprestriction_ips.comment: Use comma to seperate IP adresses

mode.label: Mode
mode.comment: Select Live to preform live transactions.
mode.tooltip: When the base configuration is still in test mode. Live mode of the portfolio is overruled.

live_merchant_id.label: Live API Key
live_merchant_id.comment: Your user account is provided by Riverty.
live_merchant_id.tooltip: To get an account contact Riverty.

test_merchant_id.label: Test API Key
test_merchant_id.comment: Your user account is provided by Riverty.

sandbox_merchant_id.label: Sandbox API Key
sandbox_merchant_id.comment: Your user account is provided by Riverty.

api_merchant_id.label: Merchant ID
api_merchant_id.comment: Your merchant ID to seperate sub contracts

portfolio_country.label: Portfolio country
portfolio_country.comment: Select the country of transaction contract

portfolio_type.label: Portfolio type
portfolio_type.comment: Select the type of transaction contract

portfolio_showbankaccount.label: Show bankaccount input field
portfolio_showbankaccount.comment: Select Yes to show the bankaccount input field.
portfolio_showbankaccount.tooltip: When No is selected the bankaccount number is not shown on the front of the shop.

portfolio_showphonenumber.label: Show phone number input field
portfolio_showphonenumber.comment: Select Yes to show the phone number input field.
portfolio_showphonenumber.tooltip: When No is selected the phone number is not shown on the front of the shop.

portfolio_showssn.label: Show social security number input field
portfolio_showssn.comment: Select Yes to show the social security number input field.
portfolio_showssn.tooltip: When No is selected the social security number is not shown on the front of the shop.

portfolio_showdob.label: Show date of birth input field
portfolio_showdob.comment: Select Yes to show the date of birth input field.
portfolio_showdob.tooltip: When No is selected the date of birth is not shown on the front of the shop.

portfolio_showbankcode.tooltip: When No is selected the bankaccount number is not shown on the front of the shop.

portfolio_showssn.label: Show social security number input field
portfolio_showssn.comment: Select Yes to show the social security number input field.
portfolio_showssn.tooltip: When No is selected the social security number is not shown on the front of the shop.

area.label: Portfolio area
area.comment: Select where the portfolio will be available

portfolio_label.label: Portfolio label
portfolio_label.comment: The label shown on the frontend

portfolio_extended_information.label: Portfolio extended information
portfolio_extended_information.comment: Extended information about the Riverty Payment Method which for example will be included in transactional emails.

portfolio_max_amount_new_customers.label: Maximum Amount for New Riverty Customers
portfolio_max_amount_new_customers.comment: N.B. This value does not influence whether or not this portfolio is available. This is only used as a label!

order_status_acceptedni.label: Status Accepted No Invoice
order_status_acceptedni.comment: New is the default state for a new order without invoice.
order_status_acceptedni.tooltip: For administrative purposes a new status can be created connected to processing.

order_status_pending.label: Status Pending
order_status_pending.comment: Pending is the default state for a new order.
order_status_pending.tooltip: For administrative purposes a new status can be created connected to new.

order_status_accepted.label: Status Accepted
order_status_accepted.comment: Processing is the default state for an order with an invoice or a shipment.
order_status_accepted.tooltip: For administrative purposes a new status can be created connected to processing.

order_status_refused.label: Status Refused
order_status_refused.comment: Canceled is the default state for an unprocessed order terminated.
order_status_refused.tooltip: For administrative purposes a new status can be created connected to Canceled.

allowspecific.label: Allowed Countries
allowspecific.tooltip: Select whether all countries may make use of this payment option, or only specific countries.

specificcountry.label: Payment from Specific Country
specificcountry.comment: Only available if 'Payment from applicable countries' is set to 'specific countries'.
specificcountry.tooltip: Define which countries are allowed to make use of this portfolio.

allowspecific_customers.label: Allowed Client groups
allowspecific_customers.tooltip: Select whether all customers may make use of this payment option, or only customers from specific customer groups.

specificcustomers.label: Specific client groups
specificcustomers.comment: Only available if 'Allowed Client groups' is set to 'specific client groups'.

notallowedshippingmethods.label: Not allowed by shipping methods
notallowedshippingmethods.comment: Select all the shipping methods where the Riverty module should NOT be allowed for.
notallowedshippingmethods.tooltip: Use CTRL + mouseclick to select multiple entries.

usegroupid.label: Use GroupId
usegroupid.tooltip: Select if the GroupId should be in the request, and on which attribute it should be based.

sort_order.label: Sort order
sort_order.tooltip: This value will determine in what order the portfolio's will appear to the customer

active.label: Portfolio enabled
active.comment: Select Yes to enable the portfolio.
active.tooltip: To use the module it needs to be enabled. When No is selected the module isn’t shown on the front of the shop.

mode.tooltip: When the base configuration is still in test mode. Live mode of the portfolio is overruled.

live_merchant_id.label: Live merchantID
live_merchant_id.comment: Your user account is provided by Riverty.
live_merchant_id.tooltip: To get an account contact Riverty.

test_merchant_id.label: Test merchantID
test_merchant_id.comment: Your user account is provided by Riverty.

portfolio_id.label: Portfolio ID
portfolio_id.comment: Riverty will deliver a portfolio ID

live_password.label: Live Password
live_password.comment: Your Password is provided by AfterPay.

test_password.label: Test Password
test_password.comment: Your Password is provided by AfterPay.

portfolio_country.label: Portfolio country
portfolio_country.comment: Select the country of transaction contract

portfolio_type.label: Portfolio type
portfolio_type.comment: Select the type of transaction contract

portfolio_showbankaccount.label: Show bankaccount input field
portfolio_showbankaccount.comment: Select Yes to show the bankaccount input field.
portfolio_showbankaccount.tooltip: When No is selected the bankaccount number is not shown on the front of the shop.

portfolio_showphonenumber.label: Show phone number input field
portfolio_showphonenumber.comment: Select Yes to show the phone number input field.
portfolio_showphonenumber.tooltip: When No is selected the phone number is not shown on the front of the shop.

portfolio_showssn.label: Show social security number input field
portfolio_showssn.comment: Select Yes to show the social security number input field.
portfolio_showssn.tooltip: When No is selected the social security number is not shown on the front of the shop.

portfolio_showdob.label: Show date of birth input field
portfolio_showdob.comment: Select Yes to show the date of birth input field.
portfolio_showdob.tooltip: When No is selected the date of birth is not shown on the front of the shop.

area.label: Portfolio area
area.comment: Select where the portfolio will be available

portfolio_label.label: Portfolio label
portfolio_label.comment: The label shown on the frontend

portfolio_extended_information.label: Portfolio extended information
portfolio_extended_information.comment: Extended information about the Riverty Payment Method which for example will be included in transactional emails.

portfolio_max_amount_new_customers.label: Maximum Amount for New Riverty Customers
portfolio_max_amount_new_customers.comment: N.B. This value does not influence whether or not this portfolio is available. This is only used as a label!

order_status_acceptedni.label: Status Accepted No Invoice
order_status_acceptedni.comment: New is the default state for a new order without invoice.
order_status_acceptedni.tooltip: For administrative purposes a new status can be created connected to processing.

order_status_pending.label: Status Pending
order_status_pending.comment: Pending is the default state for a new order.
order_status_pending.tooltip: For administrative purposes a new status can be created connected to new.

order_status_accepted.label: Status Accepted
order_status_accepted.comment: Processing is the default state for an order with an invoice or a shipment.
order_status_accepted.tooltip: For administrative purposes a new status can be created connected to processing.

order_status_refused.label: Status Refused
order_status_refused.comment: Canceled is the default state for an unprocessed order terminated.
order_status_refused.tooltip: For administrative purposes a new status can be created connected to Canceled.

allowspecific.label: Allowed Countries
allowspecific.tooltip: Select whether all countries may make use of this payment option, or only specific countries.

specificcountry.label: Payment from Specific Country
specificcountry.comment: Only available if 'Payment from applicable countries' is set to 'specific countries'.
specificcountry.tooltip: Define which countries are allowed to make use of this portfolio.

allowspecific_customers.label: Allowed Client groups
allowspecific_customers.tooltip: Select whether all customers may make use of this payment option, or only customers from specific customer groups.

specificcustomers.label: Specific client groups
specificcustomers.comment: Only available if 'Allowed Client groups' is set to 'specific client groups'.
specificcustomers.tooltip: Define which client groups are allowed to make use of this portfolio.

notallowedshippingmethods.label: Not allowed by shipping methods
notallowedshippingmethods.comment: Select all the shipping methods where the Riverty module should NOT be allowed for.
notallowedshippingmethods.tooltip: Use CTRL + mouseclick to select multiple entries.

sort_order.label: Sort order
sort_order.tooltip: This value will determine in what order the portfolio's will appear to the customer

active.label: Portfolio enabled
active.comment: Select Yes to enable the portfolio.
active.tooltip: To use the module it needs to be enabled. When No is selected the module isnâ€™t shown on the front of the shop.

limit_by_ip.label: Show payment method only for certain IP adresses

limit_by_ip_ips.label: IP Adresses
limit_by_ip_ips.comment: Use comma to seperate IP adresses

reversed_iprestriction.label: Hide payment method only for certain IP adresses

reversed_iprestriction_ips.label: IP Adresses
reversed_iprestriction_ips.comment: Use comma to seperate IP adresses
